title: PE22 0LR, Hook 2 Sisters Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/EP3032YV/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Hook 2 Sisters Limited Installation name: Freiston Farm Permit number: EPR/EP3032YV/V003  "
